external_package_disposition.rule: No external package is released or executed until this internal discovery program reaches a terminal adjudication. Existing frozen artifacts remain immutable and are not withdrawn.

purpose: Continue internal discovery until the strongest preregistered search can distinguish one common kernel, equivalent kernels, genuinely incomparable kernels, generic structure only, a bounded no-single-kernel result, or unresolved.
controlling_question: Do FARA, LTS-PROV, and materially different successful architectures instantiate a deeper nontrivial commitment that survives expanded scope, representation, reconstruction, and cost tests?

workstreams.anti_derivative_rule: A candidate fails admission if its operative commitments are merely a relabeling, direct compilation, or hidden reconstruction of FARA or LTS-PROV without independently motivated primitives and constraints.

workstreams.action: execute candidate competition under the unchanged preservation contract and complete machinery ledger
search for a candidate-neutral common kernel beneath all successful minima
test simultaneous combinations of the six positively represented feature subclasses
workstreams.rule: Separate featurewise success is not compositional closure.

workstreams.action: test materially broader representation transformations including event-state interchange, semantic dualization, causal, proof-object, process-algebra, coalgebraic, and type-theoretic encodings
expand alternative-basis reconstruction and synthesis while charging all helpers, interpreters, metadata, decoders, and generated invariants
establish declared-class lower bounds or preserve explicit countermodels and failed necessity claims
recompute the Pareto-minimal frontier under the expanded candidate universe and cost preorder
issue the strongest internally justified universal-kernel classification

decision_rules: Search architecture must be derived from accepted dependencies rather than imposed to favor an existing vocabulary.
No universal claim may be based on a non-exhaustive candidate universe without an explicit lower-bound or closure argument.
A common factor must preserve reasoning-relevant commitments and discriminate against the registered contrast class; syntactic intersection is insufficient.
Cross-feature conjunctions must be executed directly; featurewise success cannot be multiplied into combined coverage.
Equivalent reintroduction and hidden machinery count against elimination.
Tradeoffs remain incomparable and are not scalarized.
Failure to discover a deeper kernel is not global proof of nonexistence unless the declared search class is closed by a valid argument.
External validation remains deferred, not completed or waived.

release_condition_for_external_packages.rule: External release may begin only after the terminal artifact freezes the exact claim, scope, assumptions, counterexamples, and unresolved boundaries.

nonclaims: a universal structure has been discovered
existing external packages have been executed
failure to find a common kernel proves global nonexistence
